description_long: This object is a rectangular, upright stone obelisk with a rounded top, featuring intricate carvings and inscriptions on its front and sides. The surface is covered with detailed hieroglyphic text and reliefs depicting human figures and symbols, reminiscent of ancient Egyptian stelae. The stone has a weathered, brownish hue, with visible wear and some surface irregularities, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The base is solid and unadorned, blending seamlessly into the main shaft without any steps or additional platform. The tip is gently curved rather than sharply pointed, maintaining the same material and finish as the rest of the structure. There are no visible surrounding features such as platforms, fences, or vegetation in the immediate vicinity.
description: A weathered, brown stone obelisk with rounded top, covered in detailed hieroglyphic carvings and reliefs of human figures. The base is plain and solid, with no additional adornments or surrounding features.
description_view_0: The front view shows the most detailed carvings, including prominent human figures and clear hieroglyphic inscriptions.
description_view_1: This side view is darker and the carvings are less visible, but the overall rectangular shape and rounded top are evident.
description_view_2: Another side view with visible reliefs and inscriptions, though slightly less detailed than the front.
description_view_3: A clear view of the opposite face, showing additional human figures and hieroglyphs, similar in style to the front.
attribute_inscription: Hieroglyphic inscriptions are present on all visible faces, especially prominent on the front and back. The text is carved in relief, in the ancient Egyptian style, and is moderately legible.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative reliefs of human figures and symbolic motifs are carved into the stone, primarily on the front and back faces, in a traditional ancient Egyptian style.
attribute_base_design: The base is a simple, solid rectangular extension of the main shaft, with no steps, platforms, or additional decorative features. It is made of the same stone material as the rest of the obelisk.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded and smoothly transitions from the shaft, with no additional decoration or sharp point.
